result.markdown:
--- title: "A Marimo notebook in Quarto - tbc" author: Jennifer HY Lin date: "2026-1-5" draft: true filters: - marimo-team/marimo pyproject: dependencies: - pandas==2.2.3 --- This is a [Marimo](https://docs.marimo.io/) notebook currently in test mode inside a Quarto blog. Few things to note so far after using the new [Quarto-Marimo extension](https://github.com/marimo-team/quarto-marimo): 1. Marimo version 0.13.3 works currently and likely not other newer versions (noted a few issues logged about this on the extension's GitHub repo when using more current versions; may still need to try versions 0.14.3 and/or 0.17.3) 2. This Quarto-Marimo integration works in a Quarto project such as a blog. 3. The reactivity of Marimo notebooks inside Quarto blog may take a few seconds to load.
Below are sample code from Marimo with my little adaptation for a test drive. #### Just another Quarto project ```{marimo .python} #| echo: true import marimo as mo slider = mo.ui.slider(1, 10, 1, label="Look, a slider!") slider ```
When the slider is moved to the left or right, the word, "here!" will change accordingly.
#### More things And we can respond! ```{marimo .python} # No echo here means we do not show the code mo.md("2026 is " + "here! " * slider.value) ```
I'll need to explore other things to try later in Marimo...! ```{marimo .python} ## 5/2/26: for marimo v0.13.3 and v0.14.3 (tested on 12/2/26) - unable to load pandas even though it's installed in uv venv... slider works fine. The marimo-quarto plugin is being revamped/updated currently as shown in comments in issues from its repo... may leave this aside for a while and use marimo notebook via other route instead ## 12/2/26: for marimo v0.17.3, slider has disappeared and unable to load pandas as well. ## 12/2/26: for marimo v0.19.10, the quarto-marimo notebook is unable to be previewed at all. import pandas as pd df = pd.read_csv("ache_chembl.csv") df.head() ```
